_comment: Curated display strings for the ORDER ark-grid cores: Y15 (Order Sun) and Y25 (Order Moon). Keyed by the equipped core's numeric id (string), since the percentages/effects are NOT derivable from cores.json (they sit behind unresolved <$CALC>/<$TABLE> tags). Each of the 6 effects (3 Sun + 3 Moon) has one core id per support class, so 4 ids share each Relic string; the Ancient id is always the Relic id + 1. Consumed by the SHEET via expr/orderCoreName.js; an unlisted id falls back to the raw core id.
